name: Cinnamon Soy Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1 cup powdered sugar, or more as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Use this frosting to drizzle on coffee cakes or muffins, or slather on Black and White Brownies. It melts into a thin, rich glaze when the goodies are still warm.
2. In a mixing bowl, mash the tofu with the soy margarine and vanilla using a fork until relatively smooth.
3. Stir in the cinnamon and about half of the powdered sugar, mixing well.
4. Add the remaining powdered sugar and whisk until the frosting reaches a smooth, spreadable consistency. Add more powdered sugar if necessary.
Makes about 1/2 cup; enough frosting for 16 rolls or 32 brownies.
Per 1-1/2 teaspoons: 30 calories (17% from fat), 0.1g protein, 0.6g fat, 6g carbs, 9mg sodium, 0mg cholesterol, and 0mg fiber.
Veggie Life, May, 1997
